primary_sources.title: Pinned: How do we measure progress toward AGI? It takes a village – and a bit of healthy competition. 🛠️ We’re launching a global hackathon with @Kaggle to build new cognitive evaluations for AI. With $200k in prizes up for grabs, help us put our framework to the test. Join the challenge → https://goo.gle/4uqOVKK
Today we're launching Comet Enterprise. Now, the most powerful AI browser is available to enterprise teams. Research, automate tasks, and get work done without leaving the browser.

supporting_sources.title: Claude最近又在大封杀，朋友的中转站一批能给封几百个。 大家一直也都在找封号原因，网上总结的原因很多。 我之前也给大家分享过这篇防封号的文章，目前我的新账号过了半个月，依然是稳定使用的。方法如下👇👇👇 我认为除了上次我讲的住宅IP+指纹浏览器+U卡，老的账号天然自带权重，我23年的时候开通的这个，直到现在都是稳定的。 然后上次注册的新号就是使用的住宅IP+指纹浏览器的组合，也很稳定，不过这个新账号使用的邮箱是老邮箱，我建议后续大家开通新账号的时候，最好去买一个老的Gmail邮箱，配合我分享的方法，能很大概率防止封号，起码网页端使用是几乎不会的。 如果使用Claude Code，一定要把“虚拟网卡”模式打开，或者配置好本地的规则。 住宅IP推荐大家使用这个（国内直连）：https://www.equaldcdn.com/?ref=8b0ecd560d 指纹浏览器推荐AdsPower：https://www.adspower.net/share/launch 付款卡，推荐大家使用：Bitget Wallet

We're getting warmed up w/ v3 To support ARC Prize 2026 on Kaggle we needed to implement a "competition mode." This enforces a series of rules like "one run per game" and "no full game resets" We also upgraded LS20 - new mechanics Let us know what you think
